name: cycodescan
description: Run a Cycode security scan (SAST, SCA, Secrets, IaC) on your codebase and publish results to a build results tab.
helpMarkDown: Installs the Cycode CLI if not present, runs the scan, and attaches a rich HTML report to the build. Credentials are passed as environment variables and never appear in logs.
author: Cycode

inputs.name: CycodeClientID
inputs.label: Cycode Client ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Cycode API Client ID. Store this in a secret pipeline variable (e.g. `$(CycodeClientID)`).

inputs.name: CycodeClientSecret
inputs.label: Cycode Client Secret
inputs.helpMarkDown: Cycode API Client Secret. Store this in a secret pipeline variable (e.g. `$(CycodeClientSecret)`).

inputs.name: scanPath
inputs.label: Scan Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Directory to scan. Defaults to the repository root.

inputs.name: scanType
inputs.label: Scan Type(s)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Scan types to run. Use `all` to run every type, or provide a comma-separated subset: `sast`, `sca`, `secret`, `iac`. Example: `sast,secret`.

inputs.name: severityThreshold
inputs.label: Severity Threshold
inputs.helpMarkDown: Minimum severity level counted when 'Break Pipeline on Findings' is enabled. Findings below this level are still reported but do not fail the build.

inputs.name: breakPipeline
inputs.label: Break Pipeline on Findings
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fail the pipeline task if one or more findings meet or exceed the severity threshold.

inputs.name: additionalFlags
inputs.label: Additional CLI Flags
inputs.helpMarkDown: Extra flags appended verbatim to the `cycode scan path` command (e.g. `--excluded-dirs tests`).

inputs.name: verbose
inputs.label: Verbose Logging
inputs.helpMarkDown: Pass the `-v` flag to the Cycode CLI for detailed debug output.
